required_documents.description: Original letter issued by builder confirming unit allotment to buyer
required_documents.notes: Must show unit number, floor, tower, allotment date. Builder letterhead required.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Request from builder in writing. If refused, file RTI with MahaRERA citing project registration number.

required_documents.description: Registered Agreement to Sell specifying possession date, total consideration, and payment schedule
required_documents.notes: Must be registered with Sub-Registrar. Unregistered agreements have limited evidentiary value.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Obtain certified copy from Sub-Registrar office where originally registered.

required_documents.description: All official receipts issued by builder for each installment payment
required_documents.notes: Must cover ALL installments. Missing receipts must be replaced with bank statements.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Request duplicate receipts from builder. Supplement with bank statements showing corresponding debits.

required_documents.description: All written communications between buyer and builder: emails, letters, legal notices
required_documents.notes: Include delivery/read receipts. Unanswered communications strengthen buyer's case.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Export email threads. Send formal legal notice via registered post and retain acknowledgment.

required_documents.description: Builder's project registration certificate from State RERA Authority
required_documents.notes: Can be downloaded from state RERA portal using project registration number.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Download from https://maharera.mahaonline.gov.in using project RERA number.

required_documents.description: Buyer's bank statements showing all payment transactions to builder
required_documents.notes: Required to corroborate payment receipts. Critical if any receipt is missing.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Request certified bank statement from your bank branch covering 2019–2026.

required_documents.description: Government-issued photo ID of the complainant
required_documents.notes: PAN card mandatory if claim amount exceeds ₹10,00,000.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Self-attested copy of Aadhaar and PAN card.

required_documents.description: Any payment demand notices sent by builder to buyer
required_documents.notes: Important if builder claims buyer defaulted. Dates of demand letters are critical.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Retrieve from personal records. Check registered post receipts.

required_documents.description: Any letter from builder offering possession (even if delayed)
required_documents.notes: If possession has been offered but not accepted, this document is critical.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Retrieve from personal records or builder's office.

required_documents.description: Loan sanction letter and EMI statements if property was financed
required_documents.notes: Supports claim for additional compensation for financial hardship during delay.
required_documents.how_to_obtain: Request from lending bank — loan account statement and sanction letter.
